$comment: Local data security and retention inventory — names every LibreSpot-owned file location, its sensitivity, retention, export behavior, and redaction rules.

dataLocations.description: Saved install profile — SpotX flags, theme/scheme, extension selections, watcher preference
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains no credentials, tokens, or user identifiers. May reveal Spotify customization preferences.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Persists until user resets or removes LibreSpot data
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete %APPDATA%\LibreSpot\config.json
redactionRules: Redact full file paths containing Windows username

dataLocations.sensitivityNote: May contain local file paths with Windows username, Spotify version details, and error messages with stack traces
dataLocations.retentionNote: Single file, replaced on every backend run
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete the file
redactionRules: Replace Windows username in paths with <REDACTED>

dataLocations.description: Auto-reapply watcher state — last known Spotify version, last check time, last outcome
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains only Spotify version string and timestamps
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or disable watcher

dataLocations.sensitivityNote: May contain local file paths and error messages
dataLocations.retentionNote: Single file, replaced on every watcher run
redactionRules: Replace Windows username in paths with <REDACTED>

dataLocations.description: Verified download cache keyed by SHA256 hash — SpotX, Spicetify CLI, themes, extensions
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains only upstream binary payloads already verified by SHA256. No user data.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Manual clear only via Clear-LibreSpotCache or Remove LibreSpot Data
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Clear-LibreSpotCache, Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete the directory

dataLocations.description: WPF desktop shell rolling Serilog logs
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: May contain local file paths, exception messages with stack traces, and operation details
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete the directory
redactionRules: Replace Windows username in paths with <REDACTED>

dataLocations.description: WPF desktop shell crash reports with exception details
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Full exception strings may contain local paths, environment details, and partial command output
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete the directory
redactionRules: Replace Windows username in paths with <REDACTED>
Truncate stack traces to safe depth

dataLocations.description: Rotating Spicetify configuration backup snapshots (up to 5)
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains Spicetify config files and theme assets, no credentials
dataLocations.retentionNote: Oldest backup removed when count exceeds 5

dataLocations.description: WPF backend PowerShell execution copies (per-process immutable, SHA256-verified)
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains only the embedded backend script, not user data
dataLocations.retentionNote: BackendScriptService cleans stale execution copies on launch
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Automatic cleanup, or delete the directory
dataLocations.aclExpectation: restricted ACL (current user + Administrators, inheritance disabled)

dataLocations.description: Path-free receipt written after RemoveSelfData deletes the normal LibreSpot config and log roots
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains action result, timestamps, labels, and reversibility state; no raw removed paths or tokens.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Persists only until the user or OS temp cleanup removes it

dataLocations.description: Scheduled task for auto-reapply watcher (logon trigger + 30-min repetition)
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Task XML contains the launch path and arguments, no credentials
dataLocations.retentionNote: Persists until watcher is disabled or LibreSpot data is removed
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Disable Watcher, -UninstallWatcher, or Remove LibreSpot Data

invariants: No data location stores Spotify account credentials, OAuth tokens, or session cookies
No data location stores proxy credentials or authentication secrets
Support bundle export requires user preview and confirmation before writing
Support bundle redaction replaces Windows usernames in all included file paths
Crash reports and logs are never uploaded automatically — export is local-only and opt-in
